isolation.type: Rust unit tests on host machine
isolation.sharedState: none — each test creates its own mock transport

assertions.title: thread/start maps to ACP session/new + prompt

steps.expected: Test verifies thread/start sends session/new then session/prompt with extracted text, returns synthetic ThreadStart result with session ID as thread ID
steps.observed: Test passed. Code confirms: 1) mock receives session/new request, 2) after replying with sessionId, mock receives session/prompt with extracted text 'Hello Pi!', 3) result contains id='acp-sess-001' and thread_id='acp-sess-001'

steps.expected: Text extracted from 'content' field when items array not present
steps.observed: Test passed. Text 'Direct content' extracted from content field and sent via prompt

steps.expected: Returns error when no text found in params
steps.observed: Test passed. Returns RpcError::Deserialization with message containing 'no text found'

assertions.title: turn/start maps to ACP prompt (no session/new)

steps.expected: turn/start calls session/prompt only, NOT session/new
steps.observed: Test passed. First mock message has method='session/prompt' (not session/new). Text 'Follow-up' extracted correctly. Result is null (not a new thread).

steps.expected: turn/start with session_id still calls prompt only
steps.observed: Test passed. Method is session/prompt with text 'Next message'. No session/new called.
Test passed. Returns Ok(Value::Null) on idle (no active prompt to cancel). Transport returns null.

steps.expected: turn/interrupt with session_id also returns Ok(null)
steps.observed: Test passed. Returns Ok(Value::Null) with session_id='sess-42'.

assertions.title: thread/list maps to ACP session/list with format conversion

steps.expected: thread/list calls session/list, converts ACP sessions to Codex ThreadList format
steps.observed: Test passed. Mock receives session/list request. Response contains threads array with 2 entries: {id: 's1', title: 'Session 1'}, {id: 's2', title: 'Session 2'}.

steps.expected: Empty session list returns empty threads array
steps.observed: Test passed. Response has threads: [] with empty sessions from ACP.

steps.expected: thread/read calls session/load with target session ID
steps.observed: Test passed. Mock receives session/load with params.sessionId='load-sess-123'. Returns null result.
Test passed. Returns Err when no thread_id provided.

steps.expected: thread/archive returns Ok({ok: true}) with no ACP JSON-RPC sent
steps.observed: Test passed. Returns {ok: true}. Verified no ACP message sent via timeout read check.

steps.expected: collaborationMode/list returns Ok({data: []}) with no ACP call
steps.observed: Test passed. Returns {data: []}. Verified no ACP message sent via timeout read check.

summary: Tested 7 assertions (15 tests): all 7 passed. All Pi ACP method mapping behaviors verified: thread/start correctly chains session/new + session/prompt, turn/start calls prompt only, turn/interrupt returns null on cancel, thread/list converts ACP session/list to Codex format, thread/read calls session/load, no-op methods return {ok:true} without ACP calls, and collaborationMode/list returns empty data without ACP calls.
